description: C09 signal-to-noise ratios from two methods
method_daofind: DAOStarFinder PSF-fitting peak SNR (used for 5-sigma detection threshold in pipeline)
method_aperture: Aperture photometry SNR (3-pixel radius, 8-12 pixel sky annulus; photometric quality metric)
note: The pipeline 5-sigma detection threshold applies to DAOStarFinder peak SNR, not aperture SNR. A source can be detected by DAOStarFinder (peak SNR > 5) while having aperture SNR < 5.
